name: agent-skills
description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering spec, plan, build, verify, review, ship. Mirrors the addyosmani/agent-skills skill set so Codex can use the same SKILL.md files Claude Code consumes.

interface.shortDescription: Engineering workflow skills (spec, plan, build, test, review, ship).
interface.longDescription: Bundles the addyosmani/agent-skills SKILL.md set as a Codex plugin so Codex shares the same skills Claude Code uses. The skills directory contains one SKILL.md per skill (idea-refine, spec-driven-development, test-driven-development, code-review-and-quality, security-and-hardening, performance-optimization, etc.).
